SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2026 - CONTINUED TO CURE SERVICE TO APR-01-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOVANA RADOKANOVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL DELGADO, PROPERTY MANAGER . DEFENDANT REQUIRES STATUTE ALLOTTED TIME TO PREPARE FOR HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF JOVANA RADOKANOVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL DELGALDO, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADOKANOVIC, JOVANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
